top_signals.title: Oil Falls on Growing Signs of Oversupply, Progress in Iran Talks
top_signals.summary: Oil extended its run of declines on growing signs of oversupply, with traffic through the Strait of Hormuz recovering and some of the impacts of the Iran war continuing to fade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BlackRock Says Past Defaults, Next Election Cap Argentina Rally
top_signals.summary: Argentina’s stellar bond rally is set to hit a wall as next year’s presidential elections revive concern over the country’s turbulent economic past, according to Pablo Goldberg, an emerging markets portfolio manager at BlackRock Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: The Ukrainian Push for Long-Term Strategic Planning
top_signals.summary:
Welcome to The Ukraine Compass, a weekly digest of Ukrainian commentary and analysis from across the political spectrum only for War on the Rocks members. Each Monday, we bring you a curated selection of articles from Ukrainian media offering insight into how Ukrainians themselves debate the issues shaping their country.American coverage often narrows the view to the battlefield — these pieces widen it, revealing the texture of daily life, politics, and public argument in a nation at war. The perspectives gathered here are varied, candid, and often surprising, together forming a more complete picture of Ukraine as it really is.Frontline and StrategyОбозреватель —

The post The Ukrainian Push for Long-Term Strategic Planning appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ethereum backers launch nonprofit to lead institutional adoption efforts
top_signals.summary: Backed by Joe Lubin, BitMine and SharpLink, the independent organization will serve as a liaison for financial institutions exploring Ethereum as competition for institutional capital heats up.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: ‘An honest, neutral counterpart:’ Bitmine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin back new Ethereum Institutional non-profit
top_signals.summary: Bitmine, Sharplink and Consensys CEO Joseph Lubin are backing another Ethereum-focused non-profit called the Ethereum Institutional.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Europe Goes Its Own Way
top_signals.summary: Drifting from America, the continent Is rearming and reordering itself.

top_signals.title: House passes kids’ online safety bill, but Senate approval unlikely
top_signals.summary: The Kids Internet and Digital Safety (KIDS) Act passed with bipartisan support by a 267-117 margin, winning the two-thirds majority needed to greenlight the legislation under a process that speeds up a bill’s path to a vote but requires more than a simple majority.
